mainHtml:
Home page/Industries/Robotics

Robotics Parts Manufacturing Support

Manufacturing support for robot structural parts, joints, brackets, end-effectors, fixtures and prototype mechanisms, helping teams evaluate strength, weight, accuracy and assembly fit.

Robot jointsEnd effectorsFixturesPrototype mechanisms

Support for fast-moving robotics development

Robotics projects often need frequent iteration across structure, motion and assembly. The focus is on manufacturable components and practical verification parts.

Structural and joint parts

CNC and sheet metal support for frames, links, joint housings and load-bearing components.

End-effectors and fixtures

Custom grippers, mounting plates, positioning fixtures and test tools.

Prototype to low-volume path

Combine 3D printing, CNC, finishing and assembly support for staged validation.

Manufacturing Priorities

01
Strength and weightReview material, wall thickness and load paths according to the intended motion scenario.
02
Precision and fitConfirm mating references, bearings, shafts, holes and tolerance stack-up early.
03
Surface and durabilityChoose finishing based on wear, corrosion, appearance and handling needs.

Review Checklist

No commitment to vehicle regulatory certificationClearly express the purpose of the sampleMaterial performance needs to be confirmed by actual measurementThe delivery date is subject to the quotation

Submit robotics part requirements for manufacturing review

Share models, drawings and assembly context to receive process suggestions and quotation direction.

Start assessment
